steps.title: Locate the direct detail
steps.content: The question asks what New Caledonian crows are known for. The passage states directly that they are well known for creating hooks and spears from twigs.

steps.title: Rule out nearby details
steps.content: A and B mention brain size and lifespan, neither of which appears in the passage. D assigns leaf use to New Caledonian crows, but the passage says palm cockatoos use leaves to pad their beaks. The twig-tool detail is the match. The answer is C.
